title: Midterms: Picierno to stay in post despite Socialist pressure to resign
summary_full: 'European Parliament rules do not provide for the removal of members of the Bureau from office in the event that they join a different political group,' Picierno's office told Euractiv
summary_public: 'European Parliament rules do not provide for the removal of members of the Bureau from office in the event that they join a different political group,' Picierno's office told Euractiv
